title: Floating point exception is reported in case when use qwp command with -v option.

features.name: multi-module design with minimal cell count
features.description: Code should include multiple modules where at least one module contains only simple combinational assignments with very few signals, triggering edge cases in placement algorithms

features.name: conditional compilation with ifdefifndef
features.description: Code should include conditional compilation directives `ifndef/`else/`endif that select between different assignment expressions, exercising preprocessor branching in synthesis

features.name: mixed output port types with reg and wire
features.description: Code should include a module with mixed output port declarations where some outputs are declared as reg and others as wire, combined with a ternary mux and arithmetic expression
